General.Name: Kalray SA
General.Description: Kalray S.A. provides processors and acceleration cards in France. It offers acceleration cards; AI and compute acceleration cards; and storage acceleration cards, as well as MPPA processor for various data transfers. It serves AI, media and entertainment, life science, scientific research, storage, edge computing, artificial intelligence, embedded, automotive, and other sectors. Kalray S.A. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Montbonnot-Saint-Martin, France.
